$schema_note: geometry: point|line|polygon|raster. available: true = fetchable from OSM/Overpass for India today. false = no open India-wide GIS source exists (see source_note); the site will still show the toggle, greyed out, with the note as a tooltip.

layers.label: Powerlines
layers.source_note: OSM power=line/minor_line/cable. India OSM coverage is decent for transmission, sparse for LT distribution.

layers.label: Highway
layers.source_note: OSM highway=motorway/trunk/primary/secondary (National & State Highways).

layers.label: Road
layers.source_note: OSM lower-order road classes. Very dense — recommend AOI-scoped fetch, not country-wide.

layers.label: Railway
layers.source_note: OSM railway=rail. Good coverage for Indian Railways broad/metre gauge network.

layers.label: Fuel Pipeline
layers.source_note: OSM man_made=pipeline substance=oil/fuel. Coverage patchy; cross-check against PNGRB/PPAC maps for India.

layers.label: Gas Pipeline
layers.source_note: OSM man_made=pipeline substance=gas. Coverage patchy; cross-check against PNGRB/GAIL maps.

layers.label: Phone Lines
layers.source_note: OSM has almost no telecom=line coverage for India. If included, expect near-empty output; treat as unavailable in practice.

layers.label: River/Streams
layers.source_note: OSM waterway=river/stream/canal.

layers.label: Coastline
layers.source_note: OSM natural=coastline. Reliable for India.

layers.label: Waterbodies
layers.source_note: OSM natural=water (lakes, tanks, reservoirs).

layers.label: Ponds
layers.source_note: OSM natural=water + water=pond subtype.

layers.label: Wetland
layers.source_note: OSM natural=wetland. For Ramsar-site precision, cross-check against MoEFCC's official Ramsar list.

layers.label: Water Resources Management
layers.source_note: No open India-wide GIS layer. Held by Central Water Commission / State Water Resources Departments, not published as WFS/OSM.

layers.label: Protected Watershed
layers.source_note: No open India-wide GIS layer. Notified watershed boundaries sit with State Forest/Watershed departments.

layers.label: Park
layers.source_note: OSM leisure=park (urban/recreational parks, not national parks).

layers.label: Protected Areas
layers.source_note: OSM boundary=protected_area (IUCN categories). Cross-check against WII/MoEFCC's National Wildlife Database for legal precision.

layers.label: Wildlife (Sanctuaries/National Parks)
layers.source_note: Approximation via protect_class 2 (National Park) / 4 (Wildlife Sanctuary). Authoritative source is WII/MoEFCC, not fully mirrored in OSM.

layers.label: Natural Areas
layers.source_note: OSM natural=wood + leisure=nature_reserve.

layers.label: Flora And Fauna
layers.source_note: Not a discrete OSM layer — conceptually overlaps Wildlife/Protected Areas/Natural Areas above. No separate India-wide open dataset.

layers.label: Quarries
layers.source_note: OSM landuse=quarry.

layers.label: Mining
layers.source_note: OSM landuse=quarry + man_made=mineshaft. For lease-boundary precision use IBM (Indian Bureau of Mines) data, not open GIS.

layers.label: Building/Residential
layers.source_note: OSM building=* + landuse=residential. Extremely dense — strongly recommend AOI/bbox scoping, not country-wide fetch.

layers.label: Municipal Designated Residential Areas
layers.source_note: Approximated by landuse=residential above, but true municipal Master Plan zoning is not in OSM — held by local Development Authorities.

layers.label: Federal Lands
layers.source_note: Approximated via landuse=military (Defence/Cantonment lands). India has no single public 'federal land' registry equivalent to Canadian Crown Land.

layers.label: Crown Land
layers.source_note: Not applicable to India — Crown Land is a Canadian/Commonwealth-realm land tenure concept. Closest Indian analogue (Government Revenue Land) has no open GIS layer.

layers.label: Heritage
layers.source_note: OSM historic=* / heritage=*.

layers.label: Archaeological Sites
layers.source_note: OSM historic=archaeological_site. For ASI-notified sites specifically, cross-check the ASI's own protected monuments list.

layers.label: Goods of Cultural Interest (BIC/BRL)
layers.source_note: BIC/BRL are Spanish and French heritage-register designations — not applicable to India. Use Heritage/Archaeological Sites above for the Indian equivalent (ASI-protected monuments).

layers.label: Birds (Important Bird Areas)
layers.source_note: India's Important Bird & Biodiversity Areas are maintained by BNHS/BirdLife International as a licensed dataset, not open GIS.

layers.label: Fish Habitats
layers.source_note: No open India-wide GIS layer. Held by CMFRI / State Fisheries Departments.

layers.label: Caribou Management Area & Core Caribou Areas
layers.source_note: Not applicable — caribou are a North American/Arctic species; this is a Newfoundland & Labrador dataset with no Indian equivalent.

layers.label: Ecologically/Biologically Significant Marine Area
layers.source_note: India's CBD-designated EBSAs exist only as MoEFCC/ZSI reports/maps, not open GIS. Relevant only for offshore wind.

layers.label: Historical SAR (Species at Risk)
layers.source_note: Not applicable — this is a Canadian (ECCC) Species at Risk historic-occurrence dataset with no Indian equivalent.

layers.label: Municipal Boundary
layers.source_note: OSM admin_level=8 (ULB/Municipal/Panchayat boundaries). Coverage is patchy outside major cities.

layers.label: Existing Infrastructure
layers.source_note: OSM power plants/substations + landuse=industrial as a proxy for built-up energy/industrial infrastructure.

layers.label: Other Wind Farms
layers.source_note: OSM power=plant/generator with wind source tags. Cross-check against MNRE/state nodal agency wind atlas for completeness.

layers.label: Service_NL
layers.source_note: Not applicable — Service NL is a Newfoundland & Labrador (Canada) government registry/regulator with no Indian equivalent.

layers.label: Slope
layers.source_note: Not an Overpass/OSM layer. Compute from a projected (UTM) DEM — Copernicus GLO-30, ALOS PALSAR 12.5m, or CartoDEM — thresholded at 35% slope. Needs a separate raster pipeline, not this Overpass-based one.
